data.keyword: Who offers community based mental health services in Louisville?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Who offers community based mental health services in Louisville?

result.keyword: Who offers community based mental health services in Louisville?

items.markdown:
Several organizations offer community-based mental health services in Louisville, KY, ranging from comprehensive community health centers to specialized providers and support organizations.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

**Key Community Mental Health Providers in Louisville** 

- **[Seven Counties Services](https://sevencounties.org/)** : As Kentucky's leading Community Mental Health Center (CMHC), they provide services for mental health, addiction recovery, and developmental disabilities throughout the Louisville metro area.[](https://sevencounties.org/) [[1]](https://sevencounties.org/)
- **[UofL Health – Peace Hospital](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/)** : Offers comprehensive behavioral health services, including adult outpatient care, partial hospitalization programs (PHP), and specialized inpatient services for children and adolescents.[](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/) [[1]](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/)
- **[Park DuValle Community Health Center](https://pdchc.org/)** : Offers comprehensive medical and mental health services.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)[[2]](https://pdchc.org/adult-health/)[[3]](https://pdchc.org/behavioral/)
- **[CompSer Health Resources Inc](https://www.compservhealth.com/)** : Provides individual and group therapy, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).[[1]](https://www.compservhealth.com/booking-calendar/psychotherapy-1?utm_source=google&utm_medium=book_button&utm_campaign=Psychotherapy)[[2]](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/)
- **Spalding University Collective Care Center** : Provides community-based counseling services.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

**Specialized & Support Services** 

- **[Mental Health Lou Wellness Hub](https://mentalhealthlou.com/)** : A central hub for finding local mental health resources.
- **[NAMI Louisville](https://namilouisville.org/)** : Provides support groups, education, and advocacy for individuals and families affected by mental illness.
- **Louisville Recovery Community Connection** : Offers support for addiction recovery.
- **The Black Counseling & Consulting Collective** : Provides counseling services.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)[[2]](https://www.mentalhealthlou.com/about)[[3]](https://1si.org/nonprofit-spotlight-nami-louisville/)[[4]](https://namilouisville.org/programs-%26-classes)[[5]](https://www.instagram.com/namilouisville/)

**Crisis & Urgent Care Services** 

- **[988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline](https://988lifeline.org/)** : Dial 988 for immediate mental health crisis support.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)
- **Seven Counties 24/7 Crisis Lines**:
	- Adult Crisis Line: 502-589-4313
	- Child Crisis Line: 502-589-8070
	- Addiction Help Line: 502-583-3951[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)
- **[Crisis Text Line](https://www.crisistextline.org/)** : Text "LOU" to 741-741.[](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services) [[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

For a full directory of resources, you can also consult the [Metro United Way's Community Resource Directory](https://www.metrounitedway.org/).[[1]](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services)

Would you like information on **specialized services** (e.g., child, addiction, or LGBTQ+ support) or **information on insurance coverage** for these providers?
